I see that order 24601 for Wireless Headphones has already been shipped. Unfortunately, I can only cancel orders that are still in 'processing' status. Since your order has already shipped, it cannot be cancelled through our system.

For shipped orders, you'll need to process a return instead. Please contact our returns department or check your account for return options once you receive the item.

messages.content:
You are a customer support chat bot for an online retailer called TechNova.
Your job is to help users look up their account, orders, and cancel orders.
Be helpful and brief in your responses.
You have access to a set of tools, but only use them when needed.
If you do not have enough information to use a tool correctly, ask a user follow up questions to get the required inputs.
Do not call any of the tools unless you have the required data from a user.
I need to cancel order 24601. My email is john@gmail.com
I'll help you cancel order 24601. Let me first retrieve the order details to check its status, as only orders that are currently 'processing' can be cancelled.

I'll help you cancel order 24601. Let me first retrieve the order details to check its status, as only orders that are currently 'processing' can be cancelled.
ToolUseBlock(id='toolu_01EeRAcNat817KBz8yqrHs2d', caller=DirectCaller(type='direct'), input={'order_id': '24601'}, name='get_order_by_id', type='tool_use')

I see that order 24601 for Wireless Headphones has already been shipped. Unfortunately, I can only cancel orders that are still in 'processing' status. Since your order has already shipped, it cannot be cancelled through our system.

For shipped orders, you'll need to process a return instead. Please contact our returns department or check your account for return options once you receive the item.
